impact: This unblocks the source freshness recovery path by giving the syntax-first import test a valid module and providing deterministic classification for stale guidance, changed hashes, removed pages, and high-priority recrawl candidates without live crawling or raw response data.
summary: Add a small fixture-friendly PP&D source freshness classifier module with the required contract version constant.
target_task: Task checkbox-62: Add the source freshness classifier in the smallest possible Python module after the import test and four-record fixture pass, covering stale guidance, changed hashes, removed pages, and recrawl priority.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
